name: node-function-bind
title: node-function-bind
description:
Implementation of Function.prototype.bind
Function-bind can be used for unit tests, and is useful for webframeworks
that do not have the function-bind.
.
This package includes also the node-has (has) package,
Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call shortcut.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-function-bind because Implementation of Function.prototype.bind.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-function-bind as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-function-bind with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-function-bind --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
